test_cases.title: Message hover shows action button
test_cases.description: Verify that hovering over a message shows the ⋯ action button at the correct position (right for assistant, left for user)
steps: verify ⋯ button appears on the right side of the bubble
verify ⋯ button appears on the left side of the bubble

test_cases.title: Action menu opens on click and closes on Esc/outside click
test_cases.description: Verify that clicking the ⋯ button opens the action menu with all 5 items, and Esc/outside-click closes it
steps: verify menu shows: 复制, 复制纯文本, Navigate, Fork, Clone
open menu again, click outside the menu

test_cases.title: Single message copy writes markdown to clipboard
test_cases.description: Verify that collectMessageContent + copyWithToast correctly copies a message with thinking + tool call + body to clipboard
steps: call collectMessageContent(messageEl) on a message with thinking + tool call
verify returned string contains thinking block text, tool call metadata, and body
verify navigator.clipboard.writeText was called with the markdown

test_cases.title: Plain text copy strips markdown symbols
test_cases.description: Verify that 复制纯文本 mode strips markdown symbols (#, *, [, ], etc.)
steps: verify returned string does not contain #, *, [, ] symbols

test_cases.title: Batch selection mode toggles correctly
test_cases.description: Verify batch selection mode entry, checkbox toggle, count update, and exit
steps: verify selection mode active (checkboxes visible on hover)
verify floating bar shows '已选 2 条消息'
click one selected message to deselect

test_cases.title: Batch copy formats multiple messages correctly
test_cases.description: Verify batch copy output format includes role, timestamp, thinking, tool call, body
steps:
verify output format is: --- 角色 HH:MM --- 
 [Thinking: ...] 
 [Tool: name ✓ path] 
 body 
 --- ... ---

test_cases.title: Branch pill shows correct count and navigates on click
test_cases.description: Verify branch pill displays correct child count, dropdown lists all branches, click navigates to target entry
steps: verify pill shows '3' in solid style, clickable
click pill, verify dropdown opens with 3 branches
verify current branch is highlighted with accent color + active marker
verify navigate to target entry, dropdown closes

test_cases.title: Single-child branch pill is non-interactive
test_cases.description: Verify that messages with ≤1 children show a half-transparent '1' pill that is not clickable
steps: verify pill shows '1' with half opacity

test_cases.title: Utility rail appears at full panel height on hover
test_cases.description: Verify utility rail is positioned at the right of panel-body, full height, only visible on panel hover
steps: verify rail is invisible (opacity 0) when not hovering
verify rail is 36px wide and full height of panel-body

test_cases.title: Scroll buttons toggle visibility based on scroll position
test_cases.description: Verify ↓ and ↑ buttons appear/hide based on scroll position (40px threshold)
steps: scroll to top, verify ↓ visible, ↑ hidden
scroll down 100px, verify both ↑ and ↓ visible
scroll to bottom, verify ↑ visible, ↓ hidden

test_cases.title: Split mode shows independent rails per panel
test_cases.description: Verify that in split mode, each panel has its own utility rail that operates independently
steps: verify each panel has a utility rail
scroll panel 1 to bottom, verify panel 2 scroll position unchanged
verify each rail's button visibility is independent

test_cases.title: Sidebar collapse via right-edge handle
test_cases.description: Verify sidebar collapses smoothly when clicking the right-edge handle
steps: hover right edge of expanded sidebar
verify sidebar width transitions to 0 over 0.2s

test_cases.title: Sidebar collapse via header button
test_cases.description: Verify sidebar collapses via ◀ button in header

test_cases.title: Sidebar expand via left-edge button
test_cases.description: Verify sidebar expands when clicking ▸ button on left edge when collapsed
steps: with sidebar collapsed, click ▸ on left edge
verify sidebar expands to original width smoothly

test_cases.title: macOS windowed mode layout
test_cases.description: Verify windowed mode has correct layout: Row1 padding-left 68px for traffic lights, brand in Row2
steps: launch app in windowed mode on macOS
verify brand 'xyz-agent v0.x.x' is in Row2
verify New Session button is on the right of Row2

test_cases.title: macOS fullscreen mode layout
test_cases.description: Verify fullscreen mode has correct layout: brand moved to Row1, New Session is 100% width, no traffic light padding
steps: verify Row1 has no left padding
verify New Session button is full width

test_cases.title: Fork session appends -fork suffix to label
test_cases.description: Verify that forkFromEntry creates a new session with label `${原名称}-fork`
steps: verify new session label is '原名称-fork'
verify session list contains the new session

test_cases.title: Clone session appends -clone suffix to label
test_cases.description: Verify that cloneSession creates a new session with label `${原名称}-clone`
steps: verify new session label is '原名称-clone'
verify session list contains the new session

test_cases.title: WS protocol supports message.steer type
test_cases.description: Verify that the new 'message.steer' type is added to ClientMessageMap and handled by server
steps: verify runtime/src/server.ts has a handler for 'message.steer'

test_cases.title: WS protocol supports message.follow_up type
test_cases.description: Verify that the new 'message.follow_up' type is added to ClientMessageMap and handled by server
steps: verify runtime/src/server.ts has a handler for 'message.follow_up'

test_cases.title: Send mode auto-switches to Steer during AI generation
test_cases.description: Verify that SendModeStatusBar shows 'Steer' mode when AI is generating, and Enter sends message.steer
steps: verify status bar shows 'Steer · 将中断当前 AI 处理' in accent color

test_cases.title: Alt key toggles Queue mode
test_cases.description: Verify that holding Alt key switches status bar to Queue mode and Alt+Enter sends message.follow_up
steps: type message in textarea (no AI generating)
verify status bar shows 'Send · Enter 发送' in gray
verify status bar shows 'Queue · Alt+Enter 排队' in warning color

test_cases.title: Send button shows stop icon during streaming
test_cases.description: Verify that the send button changes from accent ↑ to red ■ when AI is streaming
steps: verify send button is accent background with ↑ icon when idle
verify send button becomes red background with ■ icon
